Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to respond to the users prompt they have provided a description of a PostgreSQL database schema and event log data and they want the target LLM to identify anomalies hypothesize reasons and propose relevant SQL queries The instruction says The target model should be encouraged to So we need to produce a response that does those things identify anomalies hypothesize why they happen propose relevant SQL queries

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The example event logs show anomalies For case 1002 Confirm Shipment occurs before Perform Credit Check and Validate Stock case 1003 Ship Goods occurs before Validate Stock missing validation Confirm Shipment after Ship Goods case 1004 Receive Payment before invoice missing credit check and stock validation

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Anomalies in timestamps same case timestamps overlapping or out-of-order Cases where credit check not performed case 1004 missing credit check Cases where Validate Stock missing case 1003 and 1004 Payment before invoice weird

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: General anomalies Out-of-order process steps Missing steps Duplicate events Timing anomalies Resource anomalies Additional info anomalies Value anomalies Process variant anomalies

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Potential reasons System error credit check not triggered Human error staff not following SOP Policy violation priority orders skip credit check Data entry errors missing events Unusual routes prepayment Process redesign Fraud shipping before payment

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Propose SQL queries Identify cases with missing credit check Ship Goods before Credit Check Validate Stock missing Confirm Shipment after Ship Goods Payment before Invoice Out-of-order timestamps Wrong department Duplicate activities Abnormal order value missing credit check Sequence deviations

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Categorize queries Sequence anomalies Missing steps Duplicate events Timing anomalies Resource mismatches Value mismatches Flag anomalies Use CTEs window functions joins subqueries for checks

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Ensure queries are syntactically correct for PostgreSQL using table names exactly joining with orders and resources where needed

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Structure the answer Anomalies and Hypotheses list Bullet list of anomalies hypothesized causes Then SQL queries categorized by anomaly type Brief intro and summary
